reasoning: The primary limiter for you is the 25W drop over your power curve, which suggests poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. Your last ride was a steady endurance effort, which is great for base but we need to gear up for the Alpine Loop. This session will simulate sustained climbing efforts required for the main climb at Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Alternate every 4 min: 209-218W / 242-256W to hit aerobic and anaerobic demands

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
